title: Dietrichia coccinea
uses: Dietrichia coccinea, also known as Red Stink Ant, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. In traditional medicine, Dietrichia coccinea is used to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and roots are typically used to prepare medicinal concoctions. However, further research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential side effects.
